title: Construction of Fishing Jetty at Machilipatnam on EPC basis

sections.title: Cover Page
sections.body:
Government of Andhra Pradesh
Department of Fisheries

Tender Notice for the Construction of Fishing Jetty at Machilipatnam on EPC basis.

Tender Notice Number: AP/FISH/EPC/2026/001
Date of Issue: 2026-05-04

sections.title: Instructions to Tenderers (ITT)
sections.body:
These Instructions to Tenderers (ITT) shall be read in conjunction with the Tender Data Sheet (TDS). In case of any conflict, the provisions of the TDS shall prevail.

1. Scope of Bid
2. Source of Funds
3. Fraud and Corruption [from Rulebook]
4. Eligible Bidders [JV permitted, see clause 4.4]
5. Submission of Bids (online via APeProcurement)
6. Bid Validity 120 days; EMD valid for 165 days.

sections.title: Tender Data Sheet (TDS)
sections.body:
Tender Notice Number: AP/FISH/EPC/2026/001
Name of Work: Construction of Fishing Jetty at Machilipatnam (EPC)
Location: Machilipatnam, Krishna District
Estimated Cost: ₹18.45 Cr
Completion Period: 18 months
Defect Liability Period: 24 months
Bid Validity: 120 days
EMD: ₹37,00,000 (BG/DD)
Performance Security: 5% of contract price
Bid submission deadline: 2026-06-12 15:00 IST

sections.title: Evaluation and Qualification Criteria
sections.body:
1. Bidder type: Individual / Firm / Company / JV (max 3 partners)
2. Average Annual Financial Turnover: ≥ 30% of estimated cost in similar works (last 3 FY)
3. Similar Work: design + execution of marine works of value ≥ 40% of estimated cost in any one year, last 7 years (Form FIN-3, Completion Certificate)
4. Available Bid Capacity ≥ Estimated cost. Formula: Available Bid Capacity = (A × N × 3) − B
5. Net worth ≥ 15% of estimated cost
6. Solvency Certificate from Scheduled Commercial Bank ≥ 25% of estimated cost, issued within last 6 months
7. No litigation/blacklisting in last 3 years
8. Valid GST, PAN, ITR for last 3 FYs

sections.title: Tender Forms Checklist
sections.body: FIN-1 Bid Letter; FIN-2 Bid Form; FIN-3 Similar Work; FIN-4 Average Annual Turnover; FIN-5 Bid Capacity; FIN-6 Net Worth; FIN-7 JV Agreement; FIN-8 Power of Attorney; FIN-9 Litigation/Blacklisting Declaration; FIN-10 Solvency Certificate; FIN-11 EMD Statement.

sections.title: Schedule of Payments
sections.body:
Mobilisation Advance: 10% against Bank Guarantee
Design approval: 5%
Procurement of major equipment: 20%
Substructure completion: 25%
Superstructure completion: 25%
Commissioning & Trial Operation: 10%
Final Bill (post-completion): 5%

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.body: Design, build and commission a 220m fishing jetty at Machilipatnam including berthing structures, mooring bollards, fendering system, navigational aids, and ancillary onshore facilities (auction hall, ice plant tie-in, fuel station, parking).

sections.title: Technical Specifications
sections.body: Technical Specifications require department-approved technical input. AI can structure this section and validate completeness, but cannot finalize project-specific engineering requirements without uploaded approved specifications, drawings, BOQ, or selected historical template.

sections.title: Design Criteria
sections.body: Design Criteria require department-approved technical input. AI can structure this section and validate completeness, but cannot finalize project-specific engineering requirements without uploaded approved specifications, drawings, BOQ, or selected historical template.

sections.title: General Conditions of Contract (GCC)
sections.body: Standard FIDIC-aligned conditions adopted by AP Procurement Manual including provisions for variations, claims, force majeure, dispute resolution (Arbitration & Conciliation Act 1996), and termination.

sections.title: Special Conditions of Contract (SCC)
sections.body: Project-specific amendments to GCC: defect liability 24 months; CRZ clearance to be obtained by Employer prior to mobilisation; environmental compliance per AP Coastal Aquaculture Authority directive 2024.

sections.title: Contract Forms
sections.body: Form-A Letter of Acceptance; Form-B Contract Agreement; Form-C Performance Security (BG); Form-D Advance Payment Security; Form-E Retention Money Guarantee.
